bugs.summary: The proposed patch makes running/pending status outrank blocked workflow tasks.
bugs.impact: A workflow with a blocked task and another running/pending task is reported as running instead of blocked, hiding stuck runs from status polling and operators.

requiredEvidence.quote: blocked outranks running so supervisors surface stuck runs instead of polling forever

acceptableFixes: Retain the unit test asserting blocked outranks running.
mustNotSay: This is only display ordering; workflow status controls polling/visibility.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.

difficulty.rationale: Status-priority invariant with explicit existing test evidence.

approval.notes: Second-wave draft; validate/materialize only. Requires calibration and provider review before lock.
